description: Ideal for running, this pair of sneakers from skechers double up as lifestyle shoes. While the soft footbed takes the natural curve of your feet, the perforated upper keep your feet fresh and clean. The lace-up upper of the shoes will keep your foot firm on the ground while the highly technical outsole will accelerate your speed when on the run!Upper Meshed synthetic upper for breathability Synthetic laces for durability and snug Fit Perforated side panels with metallic side strips for cooling effect Stitching accents with side S logo detail Padded collar and tongue Synthetic leather toe guard lining Midsole Midsole made of Resalyte which increases cushioning for enhanced shock absorption Outsole Square lugs and horizontal ridges on the outsole to provide superior grip High abrasion rubber toe box embedded on the upper for shock absorption Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
